body: Scouted Flushing tonight — best vantage is the corner by the grill stalls. Notes added.
Shot list is rough but covers vendor portraits and the steam/grill action. Will tighten it.
Three vendors signed releases so far — chasing the dumpling and the skewer stalls next.
Mateo — love the type treatment on option B for the cover. Let's go with that direction.
Reserved the 35mm f/1.4 for the weekend — wide open it handles the low light beautifully.
First-pass selects from night one are up — the steam frames are the strongest set.
